title: Nishir Daak
subTitle: Aghor Tantrik manages to get Tara rid of the amulet which emboldens Nishi. She transforms herself into a little girl and tries to befriend Tara with the intention to distance her away from the house.

title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
subTitle: Bamakhyapa, a saint living in the 18th century, is a great devotee of Goddess Tara. Though he is against the unconventional orthodox temple practices, he uses his divine powers to help the needy.

subTitle: Following the cessation of the Kurukshetra War, Lord Krishna arrives in Dwarka to find turmoil and disarray. He then strives to re-establish harmony and faith.

subTitle: Kartikeya puts all his efforts into a battle to defeat Tarakasura and the demon warriors. However, Tarakasura is determined to kill Kartikeya by dispatching his most formidable Asura warriors.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Daksha reaches Kailash to invite Lord Shiva and Sati to participate in the fire ritual. However, upon their arrival, Daksha humiliates Lord Shiva by refusing him entry to the ritual grounds.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Daksha grows furious when he sees Lord Shiva fail to rise in reverence after his arrival. He criticises Lord Shiva and refuses to carry the yajna.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Conflict intensifies when Daksha curses Nandi for attempting to stop him from insulting Lord Shiva. Fuming with rage, Daksha vows to seek revenge on Lord Shiva.
